violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (back area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair.Per PIC, gaskets were ordered and waiting to be received and installed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of debris: 1.walk in cooler fans 2.doors throughout establishment 3.pan storage shelves 4.gaskets in all refrigerator units 5.ice bins at bar Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

Inspector observed raw mussels being stored in water in the 1 Dr Reach in unit.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product and informed of proper procedures for storing shelled seafood. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025
Molluscan Shellfish tags did not have all of the required information.(Date of last used) were lacking. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

(Cheese) was observed held at (48) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (front dining room and back storage area ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025
Walk in cooler door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

(Walk in cooler and the lowboy ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair.Observed ambient temperatures at walk in(46DF) and lowboy (48DF). Establishment not allowed to store any TCS food products in unit until repaired and/or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine ) sanitizing solution for the (dishwasher ). New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces of the have an accumulation of debris: 1.walk in cooler food shelves 2.flat grill tables 3.pan storage shelves 4.gaskets in refrigerator units 5.stove hoods 6.ice bins at the bar Non food contact surfaces must be kept cleaned as often as neccessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025

The floors in the (kitchen) are constructed of (concrete ) which is not durable, easily cleanable, or non-absorbent. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2026
The (wall ) in the (back ) area is in poor repair. Observed exposed insulation and wood. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/19/2025
